notes: Transitions to Jab 2 as early as frame 7
Transitions to Jab 3 as early as frame 9 and Rapid Jab on 11
Transitions to Forward Smash 2 as early as frame 20. Charge hold is frame 9
Autocancels on frame 1-12 and 65 onward. Can hit same target once again after 30 frames during pogo effect.
On release, startup is 1 and total frames is 24.
Can charge for up to 60 additional frames. Startup is 4 from charge.
Fuse timer of ~4 seconds. Bomb explosion hits on frame 1/3/5/7.  After pulling, lasts 196 frames and explodes on frame 197.
Total frames includes 12 frames of hitlag
